title: Teddy Totems
description: Always have a cute little teddy friend in your off-hand :D
body: ![THANKS FOR 1 MILLION DOWNLOADS!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PivlO0XW/images/58ea8b6296b8ef4ae35f9f14e2fcd031db7af5c8.png) # Teddy Totems! Transform your Totem of Undying into an adorable teddy bear companion! ![Teddy Bear in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PivlO0XW/images/4ea30fa1832b5e4c26a7c9a16e955836c1f4be77.png) This resource pack replaces the standard totem with a cuddly, smiling teddy bear. When activated, your fuzzy protector springs to life with a soothing glow, keeping you safe on all your Minecraft adventures. The perfect little companion for any fight or adventure! :D Made possible by the original model of [@razzleberryfox](https://modrinth.com/user/RazzleberryFox), the creator of Decocraft who gave me permission to use the model. Thank you for your amazing creation! ## More from Nino - [Duck Totems](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ducky): a totem resource pack inspired by kurzgesagt - [IAS don't care](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ias-dont-care): a resource pack for mod In-game Account Switcher which removes the warning icon for unencrypted accounts
